authority: P3 gameplay/design hypothesis only. Not canon, not original server data, and not to be merged into server/content/galaxy.json without an explicit experimental overlay policy.
designPremise: The four Alliance-side missing systems are treated as names assigned by Free Planets Alliance settlers while sailing the long route toward Barat: inherited Earth geography, old-world myths, and cultural memory. The single Empire-side missing system keeps the Germanic/Wagneric theme.

systems.name: ケープホーン
systems.placementReason: South-west Alliance-side frontier candidate near geography/travel-flavored systems such as リオ・ヴェルデ. Cape Horn fits a dangerous route/cape name that settlers would remember while sailing toward Barat.

virtualPlanets.name: フエゴ
virtualPlanets.theme: Tierra del Fuego; inner harsh frontier world

virtualPlanets.name: マゼラン
virtualPlanets.theme: Magellan route; remote navigation and logistics world

systems.name: コブラヴェルデ
systems.placementReason: Alliance lower-left candidate close to リオ・ヴェルデ and other mixed geography names. Treat as a settler-era Verde/Cape-Verde style memory name rather than a Germanic imperial name.

systems.name: アンウレガルラ
systems.placementReason: Upper-left Alliance candidate near シヴァ, ハダト, ドーリア, エルゴン and other old myth/culture names. Use ancient Mesopotamian city-memory names rather than modern geography.

systems.name: モンサルヴァール
systems.placementReason: Alliance-side myth/culture candidate near ガンダルヴァ, シャンダルーア, バラトループ, and マル・アデッタ. Montsalvat is treated as a mixed place/art/Grail memory name, not a strictly Empire-Germanic one.

systems.name: ニーベルング
systems.placementReason: Only strongly Empire-coded missing name. Candidate #19 is the right-side blank/passable point near ヤヴァンハール, アルタイル, リンダーホーフ, ヴェルラ, and ドヴェルグ.

notes: This proposal adds 19 virtual planets if used as an experimental overlay: four each for ケープホーン, コブラヴェルデ, アンウレガルラ, and ニーベルング; three for モンサルヴァール.
No economy, base, production, or fleet-start stats are assigned here.
If promoted experimentally, add an explicit positionAuthority and planetAuthority such as MINIMAP_P3_VIRTUAL_OVERLAY, never manual/raster/canon.
